div.head: The Ambassador in China (Johnson) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Sir: I have the honor to refer to the Embassy’s despatch No. 63 of October 31, 1935,Not printed; see telegram No. 69, October 17, 3 p.m., from the Counselor of Embassy in China, p. 693. regarding the conflict between the Chinese and Japanese authorities at Swatow, and to enclose for the information of the Department a copy of despatch No. 90 of November 6, 1935, from the Consulate at SwatowNot printed. reporting on the present status of Sino-Japanese relations at that place. It will be observed from that despatch that potentialities for future trouble there apparently still exist.
div.closer:
For the Ambassador:
F. P. Lockhart
Counselor of Embassy
